channel.title: Tanium Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Tanium Inc. (tanium).

item.title: CVE-2026-9208 · 8.8 HIGH — Tanium addressed an unauthorized code execution vulnerability in Connect.
item.description: Tanium addressed an unauthorized code execution vulnerability in Connect.

item.title: CVE-2026-9207 · 8.8 HIGH — Tanium addressed an unauthorized code execution vulnerability in Connect.
item.description: Tanium addressed an unauthorized code execution vulnerability in Connect.

item.title: CVE-2026-2408 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Use-after-free in Cloud Workloads
item.description: Tanium addressed a use-after-free vulnerability in the Cloud Workloads Enforce client extension.

item.title: CVE-2026-2435 · 6.3 MEDIUM — ASSET-7706
item.description: Tanium addressed a SQL injection vulnerability in Asset.

item.title: CVE-2026-1344 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Insecure file permissions in Enforce Recovery Key Portal
item.description: Tanium addressed an insecure file permissions vulnerability in Enforce Recovery Key Portal.
